title: Workload Proxy Definition
content: The DataGrip schema does not contain a dedicated workload column. In this MVP, workload questions are answered with a proxy view that ranks athletes by summed total_distance and also returns summed sprint_distance, high_intensity_efforts, and duration_minutes for context.

title: Sprint Distance Definition
content: Sprint distance is stored in gps_metrics.sprint_distance and is usually aggregated across sessions after joining gps_metrics to sessions and athletes.

title: Sleep Score Definition
content: Sleep score is stored in wellness.sleep_score and should typically be averaged over the requested time window.
